message:
fix(context): correct rotation history bugs found in code review

- Fix session + --failed flag combination in rotate_context.go: when both
  a session name and --failed flag were specified, the --failed filter was
  ignored. Now properly filters by session first, then by failure status.

- Fix failed rotations not being recorded to persistent history: the
  recordRotationToHistory function was only called for successful rotations.
  Now records all rotation attempts (both success and failure) for complete
  audit trail.

- Fix linter issues: properly suppress unchecked error returns from os.Remove
  in defer statements and rand.Read (which has extremely low failure probability).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
